chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3210 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. For hearing of main case. 21.09.2023. Petitioner is present in person. -------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The grievance of the Petitioner pertains to the existence of unlicensed cattle markets within the precincts of the PDOHA. On the last date of hearing, the Petitioner acknowledged that those markets were no longer in existence after Eid-ul-Adha. Her second grievance was with regard to an incident that had taken place at one of those sites, where she was allegedly terrorized by unknown persons whilst agitating against such markets. In that regard, the Petitioner was given time to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability of the instant Petition, as no FIR had even been lodged by her. Even today, the Petitioner is not in a position to advance any cogent argument on that score. As such, in absence of any identifiable subsisting violation, we are of the view that the Petition does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ. That being so, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
